card.name: Champion of Blood
card.text: Double strike Whenever Champion of Blood deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Effigy {2}{R} (When you discard this card, you may pay {2}{R}. If you do, create a token that's a copy of it except it's a 1/1 Construct creature.)

card.name: Stern Archimandrite
card.text: If one or more tokens would be created under your control, twice that many of those tokens are created instead. Effigy {1}{W}{W} (When you discard this card, you may pay {1}{W}{W}. If you do, create a token that's a copy of it except it's a 1/1 Construct creature.)

card.name: Primordial Behemoth
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, distribute three +1/+1 counters among creatures you control. Effigy {2}{G}{G} (When you discard this card, you may pay {2}{G}{G}. If you do, create a token that's a copy of it except it's a 1/1 Construct creature.)

card.name: Meat Shepherd
card.text: Lifelink At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life and create a 1/1 white Homunculus creature token. Effigy {2}{B} (When you discard this card, you may pay {2}{B}. If you do, create a token that's a copy of it except it's a 1/1 Construct creature.)

card.name: Arbiter of Time
card.text: Whenever Arbiter of Time attacks, after this phase, there is an additional beginning phase. (The beginning phase includes the untap, upkeep, and draw steps.) Effigy {2}{U} (When you discard this card, you may pay {2}{U}. If you do, create a token that's a copy of it except it's a 1/1 Construct creature.)

card.name: Bitter Schism
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. Its controller creates a token that's a copy of it, except it's a Saga enchantment with "r{4}—You lose the game" in addition to its other types and abilities.

card.name: Ascend to Godhood
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Choose a legendary permanent card name. Sacrifice a nonland permanent. II, III — Search your library for a card with the chosen name, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Piousion, the Gods' Grave
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) Piousion, the Gods' Grave enters the battlefield tapped. {BG}{BG}{BG}{BG}{BG}, {T}, Exile Piousion: Return target creature card with mana value 5 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Sotak, the Bloodbringer
card.text: As long as you control fewer than seven nonland permanents, Sotak, the Bloodbringer is an enchantment and isn't a creature. {B}, Pay 1 life: Create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") {G}{W}, Sacrifice seven Bloods: Exile target permanent.

card.name: Gore Altar
card.text: As Gore Altar enters the battlefield, choose a nonland card name. Activated abilities of sources with the chosen name can't be activated. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice Gore Altar: Draw a card.

card.name: Shrouded Temple
card.text: At the beginning of the end step, if you control no enchantments, sacrifice Shrouded Temple. {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Forgotten Vista
card.text: You may have Forgotten Vista enters the battlefield tapped as a copy of any land card in a graveyard. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Helm of the Gods
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 for each enchantment you control. Equip {1}

card.name: Solemn Sentinel
card.text: When Solemn Sentinel enters the battlefield, you may return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield. When Solemn Sentinel dies, exile it. When you do, return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Indignant Godgrave
card.text: When Indignant Godgrave enters the battlefield, it deals 3 damage to each opponent. {1}{R}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice Indignant Godgrave or discard a sorcery card: Indignant Godgrave deals 3 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Painted Supplicant
card.text: When Painted Supplicant dies, create a 1/1 blue Eye enchantment creature token.

card.name: Mournsong Shadow
card.text: Whenever an enchantment enters the battlefield under your control, you gain 1 life. {3}{W}: Mournsong Shadow gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each enchantment you control.

card.name: Flesh Haulier
card.text: When Flesh Haulier enters the battlefield, you may sacrifice an artifact, creature, or enchantment. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Anoa's Reaver
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Violent Exemplar
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Silent Paladin
card.text: Vigilance When Silent Paladin dies, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Pshryke Swarm
card.text: Flying Oblation — Whenever Pshryke Swarm attacks, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn.

card.name: Gaunt Reaver
card.text: Vigilance When Gaunt Reaver enters the battlefield, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Hallowed Scartificer
card.text: Flying When Hallowed Scartificer enters the battlefield, create a 1/1 white Homunculus creature token.

card.name: Reliquary Custodian
card.text: When Reliquary Custodian enters the battlefield, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain vigilance until end of turn.

card.name: Kushabi Gaoler
card.text: When Kushabi Gaoler enters the battlefield, exile target creature an opponent controls until Kushabi Gaoler leaves the battlefield. Communion {1}{W}{W} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Expel
card.text: Exile target tapped creature.

card.name: Banishing Light
card.text: When Banishing Light enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until Banishing Light leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Godkiller Strike
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains flying and shielded until end of turn. (Prevent all damage that would be dealt to it.)

card.name: Climb to the Firmament
card.text: When Climb to the Firmament enters the battlefield, choose 3, 4, or 5, then exile all creatures with the chosen mana value until Climb to the Firmament leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Anoa, Man Made God
card.text: As long as you control fewer than seven nonland permanents, Anoa, Man Made God is an enchantment and isn't a creature. Whenever a creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Schismatic Purge
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice a creature and an enchantment. Destroy all creatures and enchantments. If the additional cost was paid, exile those permanents instead.

card.name: Seraph Erythratokos
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever you sacrifice Blood or a nontoken permanent, create a 1/1 white Homunculus creature token.

card.name: Flesh Gives Way to Divinity
card.text: Create X 1/1 white Homunculus creature token. Then if X is 5 or more, distribute X +1/+1 counters among creatures you control.

card.name: Consumption
card.text: If you would gain life, you gain twice that much life instead. Your opponents can't gain life.

card.name: Harsh Pantokrator
card.text: Flying Whenever an enchantment enters the battlefield under your control, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until Harsh Pantokrator leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Anointed Kouropalates
card.text: Whenever one or more Demons you control attack, each opponent discards a card. For each opponent who didn't discard a nonland card this way, you draw a card. Communion {1}{B}{B} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Viscera Carver
card.text: Vigilance Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a 1/1 white Homunculus creature token.

card.name: Masterwork of Meat
card.text: Flying, first strike

card.name: Sainted Carapace
card.text: Oblation — At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn.

card.name: Blind Custodian
card.text: When Blind Custodian dies, you may return target enchantment card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Anoa's Anointed
card.text: Flying, vigilance

card.name: Living Martyr
card.text: Flying Oblation — Living Martyr gets +1/+0 and has vigilance as long as you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn.

card.name: Venereal Mother
card.text: When Venereal Mother enters the battlefield or ides, return target nonland permanent card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Caught in Oblivion
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each enchantment you control. Exile target creature.

card.name: Reflect
card.text: Return target enchantment card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Duty Beyond Death
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy those creatures.)

card.name: Yoast's Watcher
card.text: Oblation — Yoast's Watcher can't be blocked as long as you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn.

card.name: Ren's Heretic
card.text: Flash

card.name: Sage of the Worm
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Keening Hormagaunt
card.text: Flying When Keening Hormagaunt enters the battlefield, create a 1/1 blue Eye enchantment creature token.

card.name: Crackling Wraith
card.text: Vigilance Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

card.name: Basilica Pestwing
card.text: Flying

card.name: Psychopomp Harrier
card.text: Flying When Psychopomp Harrier enters the battlefield, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Blade of Mabrea
card.text: When Blade of Mabrea enters the battlefield, put target creature an opponent controls into its owner's library second from the top.

card.name: Forgive the Wretched
card.text: Target creature you control gains hexproof and shielded until end of turn. (Prevent all damage that would be dealt to it.) Create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Prayer of Atonement
card.text: Counter target spell. Oblation — If you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Leviathan's Promise
card.text: Surveil 1, then draw a card. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Oblation — {1}{U}, Exile Leviathan's Promise from your graveyard: Draw a card. Activate only if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn.

card.name: Thirst for Meaning
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard an enchantment card.

card.name: A Hatebound Heart
card.text: Enchant artifact or creature Enchanted permanent is a Blood artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card," and it loses all other abilities. (If it was a creature, it's no longer a creature.)

card.name: Lost in Ignominy
card.text: Target creature's owner puts it on their choice of bottom of their library or into their library second from the top. Create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Sacred Mysteries
card.text: Each opponent shuffles, then exiles a number of cards from the top of their library equal to half their starting library, rounded up.

card.name: Glorious Triumph
card.text: Exile all creatures, then return them to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Hesychast's Chant
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may sacrifice an enchantment. If you do, this spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the sacrificed enchantment's mana value. Draw X cards.

card.name: The Riddle of Pain
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever The Riddle of Pain deals combat damage to a player, create that many Blood tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Bloods you control have "{T}, Sacrifice two Bloods: Draw a card."

card.name: Thief of Insight
card.text: Flying, prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever Thief of Insight deals combat damage to a player, you win the game if your library has fewer than that many cards in it.

card.name: Heresy Flays the Holy Word
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Each opponent mills cards until that player has milled a land card. II — Each opponent mills cards until that player has milled a creature card. III — Each opponent mills cards until that player has milled a noncreature, nonland card.

card.name: Cachexia
card.text: Flying If you would draw a card except the first one you draw in each of your draw steps, draw two cards instead. Each opponent can't draw more than one card each turn.

card.name: Youthful Scholar
card.text: When Youthful Scholar dies, draw two cards.

card.name: Evrotas Ferryman
card.text: When Evrotas Ferryman enters the battlefield, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Oblation — As you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, Evrotas Ferryman has hexproof and can't be blocked.

card.name: Wretched Cultist
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) {T}: Create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Bloodpsalm Chorister
card.text: {T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast an enchantment spell. If that mana is spent to cast a Saga spell, you may have that Saga enter the battlefield with an additional lore counter on it. (Skipped chapters don't trigger.)

card.name: Penumbral Conjurer
card.text: Enchantment spells you cast cost {U} (or {1}) less to cast. Communion {1}{U} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Annul
card.text: Counter target artifact or enchantment spell.

card.name: Temerity
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 and has flying. When Temerity is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Ritual Refusal
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a Blood or pay {2}. The owner of target spell or creature puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: Dream
card.text: Look at the top three cards of your library, then put them back in any order. You may shuffle. Draw a card.

card.name: Taste of Divinity
card.text: Until end of turn, target non-Aura permanent becomes a 3/3 blue Demon creature with flying and vigilance.

card.name: Carver of Histories
card.text: When Carver enters the battlefield, mill three cards, then you may return an enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand. Whenever the final chapter ability of a Saga you control resolves, put a number of +1/+1 counters on Carver of Histories equal to that ability's chapter number.

card.name: Spite Merchant
card.text: {B}, Sacrifice Spite Merchant: Target opponent sacrifices an enchantment of their choice.

card.name: Sanguine Vassal
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice Sanguine Vassal: Draw a card.

card.name: Fleshmeld Expendable
card.text: Fleshmeld Expendable can't block. When Fleshmeld Expendable dies, create two tapped 1/1 white Homunculus creature tokens.

card.name: Desolation Paladin
card.text: Menace Oblation — At the beginning of your end step, if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Desolation Paladin.

card.name: Once and Forgotten King
card.text: Oblation — As long as you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, Once and Forgotten King has menace and deathtouch.

card.name: Living Incense
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Communion {3}{B} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Soukia Rootcorpse
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Breakbone Aspirant
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or pay {2}. Menace When Breakbone Aspirant enters the battlefield, you draw a card and you lose 1 life.

card.name: Evrotos Muckspawn
card.text: Oblation — This spell costs {2} less to cast as long as you've discarded a card or sacrificed a permanent this turn.

card.name: Caught By Hubris
card.text: Target creature gets +2/-2 and gains lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Diresight
card.text: Surveil 2, then draw two cards. You lose 2 life. (To surveil 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Winter's Intervention
card.text: Winter's Intervention deals 2 damage to target creature. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Grim Hymnal
card.text: Destroy target creature, enchantment, or planeswalker.

card.name: Mabrea's Grasp
card.text: Exile target creature, enchantment, or planeswalker. Create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Hand of Sotak
card.text: Flying At the beginning of your upkeep, you draw a card and you lose 1 life. Communion {1}{B}{B} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Blooddrinker Hesychast
card.text: Menace When Blooddrinker Hesychast enters the battlefield, each other creature gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the number of enchantments you control.

card.name: Lord of the Gallows
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you gain life, you may have target opponent lose that much life. Do this only once each turn.

card.name: Consult the Haruspex
card.text: Target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card and creates two Blood tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Dyscrasia
card.text: Whenever a creature enters the battlefield under you control, create a 1/1 white Homunculus creature token. This ability triggers only once each turn. Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, that player sacrifices a creature. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Cull the Impenitent
card.text: All creatures get -3/-3 until end of turn. Until end of turn, if a creature would die, instead exile it and you create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Sanctified Meat
card.text: Flash When Sanctified Meat dies, target creature an opponent controls gets -1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: A Gift of Blood
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature. Create a 1/1 white Homunculus creature token, a Blood token, and a Treasure token. (They're artifacts. A Blood has "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card." A Treasure has "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Profane Incense
card.text: Flying, menace, deathtouch

card.name: Khoe's Revenant
card.text: Flash When Khoe's Revenant enters the battlefield, return to your hand all cards in your graveyard that you discarded this turn.

card.name: Tattered Corpsewing
card.text: Flying, menace When Tattered Corpsewing enters the battlefield, you may discard a card. If you do, all creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Basal Retributor
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Communion {1}{B}{B} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Spawn of Apostasy
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever a nontoken creature dies, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Holy Words Are Writ In Blood
A Peerless Offering
card.text: Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn. Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn.

card.name: Beseech the Dark
card.text: Look at the top card of your library. As many times as you choose, you may pay 1 life, exile that card, then look at the top card of your library. Then draw a card.

card.name: Exquisite Torturer
card.text: {B}, {T}, Discard a creature card: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Khoe's Harvest
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Put a soul counter on it. It's a Graveborn enchantment creature in addition to its other types.

card.name: Flesh to Ash
card.text: Destroy target nonenchantment creature.

card.name: Oudh Whisperer
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Oblation — As long as you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, Oudh Whisperer has menace.

card.name: Tide of Flesh
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Homunculus creature tokens.

card.name: Guardian of the Hearth
card.text: During your turn, Guardian of the Hearth has first strike. When Guardian of the Hearth dies, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Skinless Paladin
card.text: During your turn, Skinless Paladin has double strike.

card.name: Grasping Spawn
card.text: Reach

card.name: Scion Canonarch
card.text: Trample, reach

card.name: Sotak's Handmaid
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you've sacrificed a permanent this turn. Haste

card.name: Wretchflayer Duo
card.text: Reach When Wretchflayer Duo enters the battlefield or dies, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Savage Gutripper
card.text: Trample, haste When Savage Gutripper enters the battlefield, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Wade through Gore
card.text: Wade through Gore deals 2 damage to target creature. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead. Create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: The Gnashing of Teeth
card.text: Target creature gains double strike and trample until end of turn.

card.name: Sotak Learns the Secret of Blood
Strip Away Layers
card.text: • Strip Away Layers deals 1 damage to target creature and 1 damage to that creature's controller. • Exile target artifact.

card.name: Fires of the First Ones
card.text: Fires of the First Ones deals 4 damage to target creature.

card.name: Shagohod's Wrath
card.text: Shagohod's Wrath deals 5 damage to target creature, planeswalker, or battle. If a creature or planeswalker dealt damage this way would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Insidious Inciter
card.text: Menace Ward—Discard a card. If another creature or enchantment you control would deal damage to an opponent or a permanent an opponent controls, it deals double that damage instead.

card.name: Scourge of Holy Kush
card.text: Flying Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn. {R}: Create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Sotak's Firebird
card.text: Flying Creatures you control have haste. Communion {1}{R}{R} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Brutal Tribute
card.text: Create a number of Treasure tokens equal to target spell's mana value. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: Promising Neophyte
card.text: Haste Whenever Promising Neophyte attacks, defending player creates a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Epithumia
card.text: Flying Noncreature spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Noncreature spells your opponents cast cost {1} more to cast.

card.name: Lowly Wretch
card.text: Prowess, prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each instance of prowess it has.)

card.name: Mortifier of Flesh
card.text: Damage can't be prevented. Whenever Mortifier attacks, it deals 1 damage to the player or permanent it's attacking.

card.name: Vulturine Phoenix
card.text: Flying, haste Oblation — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, you may pay {3}{R}{R}. If you do, return Vulturine Phoenix from your graveyard to the battlefield with a decayed counter on it. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Pyre Titan
card.text: Oblation — When Pyre Titan enters the battlefield, it deals 4 damage to each opponent. If you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, it deals 6 damage to each opponent instead.

card.name: Veil Parter
card.text: When Veil Parter dies, it deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Titan Carver
card.text: Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) Whenever Titan Carver attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, exile the top card of your library. Until end of turn, you may play that card and you may cast it as though it had flash.

card.name: Viscera Diviner
card.text: When Viscera Diviner enters the battlefield, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Whenever Viscera Diviner attacks, you may sacrifice another artifact or creature. If you do, Viscera Diviner gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Shadow of Greatness
card.text: Exile target noncreature card from your graveyard. Until end of turn, you may cast a copy of that card. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.)

card.name: Hymnal of Hailfire
card.text: Oblation — At the beginning of each of your postcombat main phases, if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, Hymnal of Hailfire deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Insidious Incitment
card.text: Target creature gains menace and haste until end of turn. Draw a card.

card.name: Bloodborn Frenzy
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste and prowess until end of turn. Create a Blood token. (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, that creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. A Blood token is an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Bloodied Ascendance
card.text: Bloodied Ascendance deals 4 damage to any target. If excess damage was dealt to a permanent this way, create that many Blood tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Gore Widow
card.text: Deathtouch {T}, Tap an untapped creature you control: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Ginilla's Daughter
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an enchantment spell.

card.name: Knightly Vestigate
card.text: Reach When Knightly Vestigate dies, create a 2/2 green Ogre creature token.

card.name: Evrotos Tyrant
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever Evrotos Tyrant deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Gnarled Wastrel
card.text: Trample When Gnarled Wastrel dies, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Sotak's Executioner
card.text: When Sotak's Executioner enters the battlefield, create a 2/2 green Ogre creature token.

card.name: Mucktiller Spawn
card.text: When Mucktiller Spawn enters the battlefield, you may sacrifice a land. If you do, create a tapped colorless land token named Everywhere that is every basic land type.

card.name: Evrotas Savage
card.text: Vigilance, reach

card.name: Mabrea's Warden
card.text: When Mabrea's Warden enters the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Famished Husk
card.text: Trample When Famished Husk enters the battlefield, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Strike the Face of God
card.text: Oblation — Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn. Then it fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: The Enormity of Flesh
card.text: Target creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn. Create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Splendor in Ruins
card.text: Mill three cards, then you may put a land card from your hand or graveyard onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Commune with Spirits
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal an enchantment or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Colossal Emergence
card.text: Creatures you control have base power and toughness 20/20.

card.name: Khoe, Gore Harvester
card.text: As long as you control fewer than seven nonland permanents, Khoe, Gore Harvester is an enchantment and isn't a creature. Creatures you control can't block. You may cast creature spells from your graveyard.

card.name: Primeval Growth
card.text: Primeval Growth can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Whenever you put one or more counters on a noncreature permanent you control, put that many +1/+1 counters on Primeval Growth.

card.name: The Apostasy of Flesh
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Create a 2/2 green Ogre creature token. II, III — Search your library for a creature card, exile it, then shuffle. If its power is less than or equal to the number of creatures you control, put it onto the battlefield. Otherwise, put it into your hand. ​

card.name: Godgrave Ceremony
card.text: You may play lands from your graveyard. Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Autumnal Equinox
card.text: You may cast creature and enchantment spells as though they had flash.

card.name: Cacochymia
card.text: Once during each of your turns, you may cast a creature spell from your graveyard. Whenever you cast a creature spell this way, it enters the battlefield with a finality counter on it. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.) If a creature an opponent controls would die, exile it instead.

card.name: Yawning Devourer
card.text: Yawning Devourer can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. {G}: Exile target card from a graveyard and put a +1/+1 counter on Yawning Devourer.

card.name: Godblood Martyr
card.text: Flash When Godblood Martyr enters the battlefield, up to two other target creatures you control gain shielded until end of turn. (Prevent all damage that would be dealt to them.)

card.name: Wretched Inevitability
card.text: Trample When Wretched Inevitability enters the battlefield, return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Thrasher of Penitents
card.text: When Thrasher of Penitents enters the battlefield, create a 2/2 green Ogre creature token. Oblation — As long as you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, creatures you control can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.

card.name: Destiny Spinner
card.text: Creature and enchantment spells you control can't be countered. {3}{G}: Target land you control becomes an X/X Elemental creature with trample and haste until end of turn, where X is the number of enchantments you control. It's still a land.

card.name: Shackled Impenitent
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, put a +1/+1 counter on Shackled Impenitent.

card.name: World Eater
card.text: Trample When World Eater enters the battlefield, each opponent sacrifices a noncreature, nonland permanent.

card.name: Savage Hesychast
card.text: Whenever a creature with power 4 or greater enters the battlefield under your control, draw a card. Communion {2}{G} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Overwhelming Brutality
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each enchantment you control and has trample.

card.name: Bridge to Infinity
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a permanent with mana value 3 or greater, draw a card.

card.name: Godblood Wellspring
card.text: You may play an additional land on each of your turns. Lands you control enter the battlefield untapped.

card.name: Seer of Fable
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Oblation — {1}{G}: Seer of Fable has base power and toughness 3/3 until end of turn. Activate only if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn.

card.name: Spoils of Blood
card.text: Create an X/X black Horror creature token, where X is the number of creatures that died this turn.

card.name: Raw Chaos
card.text: Choose target nonenchantment, nonland permanent. Exile cards from the top of your library until you reveal a nonland card with equal or lesser mana value. When you do, the chosen permanent's controller may sacrifice it. If they don't, you may cast the card without paying its mana value.

card.name: Ethereal Ritual
card.text: When Ethereal Ritual enters the battlefield, draw a card. Enchantments you cast cost {1} less to cast. Enchantment creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Mangle
card.text: Destroy target nonland permanent. You lose life equal to its mana value.

card.name: Burning Mendicant
card.text: Trample Burning Mendicant gets +X/+0, where X is the amount of damage it has dealt this turn.

card.name: Cemetery Metropolite
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, if you have four or more enchantment cards in your graveyard, you may return target enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Hallowed Mass
card.text: Whenever another nontoken permanent you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you may create a token that's a copy of it. Do this only once each turn. Communion {3}{G}{W} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Vivisected Fleshthief
card.text: Whenever Vivisected Fleshthief attacks, put target nonland permanent an opponent controls into its owner's library third from the top.

card.name: Ascended Anchorite
card.text: Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. Then discard a card unless that creature was an enchantment. Communion {1}{W}{U} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Mabrea's Shrike
card.text: Flying Whenever Mabrea's Shrike enters the battlefield or attacks, you may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Brutal Offering
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or discard a card. Draw two cards and create two Blood tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: The Outsider Defies Sotak
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — You may sacrifice a creature. If you do, draw a card. II — You may sacrifice an enchantment. If you do, draw a card. III — Return target non-Saga permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Withered Warden
card.text: Lifelink Enchantment spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Acolyte of the Fleshcrafter
card.text: Oblation — At the beginning of your end step, if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, create a 1/1 white Homunculus creature token. {W}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Soukia Remnant
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Whenever you tap Soukia Remnant for mana, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Sotak Reshapes the World
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. II — Create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") III — Return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Pureblood Reeve
card.text: Vigilance, prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.) When Pureblood Reeve enters the battlefield, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Sin-Gilt Scribes
card.text: When Sin-Gilt Scribes enters the battlefield, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card. Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Disciple of Yoast
card.text: Whenever Disciple of Yoast or another nontoken enchantment enters the battlefield under your control, create a 1/1 blue Eye enchantment creature token. Communion {1}{W}{U} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Void Hermit
card.text: When Void Hermit enters the battlefield, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Whenever you discard a card, you may exile that card from your graveyard. If you do, you may play that card this turn.

card.name: Sotak's Paladin
card.text: Menace Oblation — When Sotak's Paladin enters the battlefield, if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, each opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice.

card.name: Mayhem Lasher
card.text: Trample Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, Mayhem Lasher deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Hesychast's Solitude
card.text: Whenever an enchantment enters the battlefield under your control, draw a card.

card.name: Sotak's Scourge
card.text: Oblation — At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, you may have Sotak's Scourge become a 3/3 Demigod creature with flying until end of turn. Communion {W}{B} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Evrotos Dredger
card.text: Oblation — At the beginning of your end step, if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, draw a card. Communion {2}{B}{G} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Lorespeaker
card.text: Lorespeaker can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Whenever Lorespeaker deals combat damage to a player, you may exile a Saga card from your graveyard. When you do, copy a chapter ability of the exiled card.

card.name: The First to Bleed Has Bled
Sanguine Initiate
card.text: When Sanguine Initiate enters the battlefield or dies, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Fleshdreaming
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Homunculus creature tokens and two Blood tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Iron Giant
card.text: Vigilance, reach, trample

card.name: Terramorphic Expanse
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Terramorphic Expanse: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Gore Sluice
card.text: When Gore Sluice enters the battlefield, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.) {1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice Gore Sluice: Draw a card.

card.name: Sacred Surrogate
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, put a clay counter on Sacred Surrogate. As long as Sacred Surrogate has three or more clay counters on it, it's a 0/0 Golem artifact creature with "Sacred Surrogate gets +1/+1 for each clay counter on it."

card.name: Sacred Failure
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a nonland permanent or pay {2}. Trample

card.name: Mockery of Life
card.text: When Mockery of Life enters the battlefield, create a Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Exile target player's graveyard.

card.name: Sintered Cenobite
card.text: {2}, {T}, Sacrifice Sintered Cenobite: Until end of turn, whenever a chapter ability of a Saga you control triggers, copy it and you may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Scorned Grave
card.text: When Scorned Grave enters the battlefield, draw a card. You may sacrifice Scorned Grave as though it were a creature to pay a cost.

card.name: Unborn God
card.text: Oblation — At the beginning of your end step, if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Unborn God. Whenever a creature you control attacks, you may move any number of +1/+1 counters from Unborn God onto it.

card.name: Gore Barque
card.text: Flying Sacrifice a Blood: Gore Barque becomes an artifact creature until end of turn. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Spreading Filth
card.text: Destroy target land. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Draw a card.

card.name: Moonlit Basilica
card.text: Moonlit Basilica enters the battlefield tapped. As it enters, choose a color. {T}: Add one mana of the chosen color. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Moonlit Basilica: Draw a card.

card.name: Monument to Divinity
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. Oblation — {2}: Monument to Divinity becomes a 3/3 Demigod creature until end of turn. It's still a land. Activate only if you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn.

card.name: APS Draft Archetypes APS
card.text: {W}{U} ENCHANTMENTS Magic hangs thick in the air of Kushab. Your enchantment creatures are power made real. UB OBLATION Give offering to power. What you discard or sacrifice will be repaid in kind. {B}{R} OBLATION Strike quickly, discard your worldly burdens, and your reward will come. {R}{G} SACRIFICE Sagas, creatures, Blood... All is fodder for the gods. {G}{W} ENCHANTMENTS Craft myths with Sagas and offer communion through enchantment creatures. {W}{B} OBLATION Slowly, surely, your offerings will be accepted by the First Ones. {B}{G} BLOOD Amass the power of Kushab through sanguine libations. {G}{U} SAGAS Great myths are retold through the recounting of Sagas. {U}{R} SPELLS Through blood you will persevere, and find the flurry of spells to win. {R}{W} NONCREATURES Enchantments, spells, evoked Sagas—The way of flesh requires greater magic to functions.

card.name: Anoa Sheds His Flesh
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I, II — Create a 1/1 white Homunculus creature token. III — Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. ​

card.name: Ukarth Ren, Worldflayer
card.text: When Ukarth Ren, Worldflayer enters the battlefield, create a black enchantment token named Fleshweave with "Whenever a player discards a card, each opponent loses 1 life." [+1]: Draw a card, then discard a card. [-3]: Return target permanent to its owner's hand. Then that player discards a card. [-6]: Each opponent discards their hand, then draws that many cards and sacrifices that many permanents.

card.name: Fleshweave APS
card.text: Whenever a player discards a card, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Brutal Mendicant
card.text: During your turn, Brutal Mendicant has double strike. Oblation — Brutal Mendicant gets +1/+1 as long as you've sacrificed a permanent or discarded a card this turn.

card.name: Rimespire Vista
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) Rimespire Vista enters the battlefield tapped unless seven or more cards are in your graveyard.

card.name: Rotroot Vista
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) Rotroot Vista enters the battlefield tapped unless seven or more cards are in your graveyard.

card.name: Ironcourt Vista
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) Ironcourt Vista enters the battlefield tapped unless seven or more cards are in your graveyard.

card.name: Wildstone Vista
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) Wildstone Vista enters the battlefield tapped unless seven or more cards are in your graveyard.

card.name: Hallowgrave Vista
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) Hallowgrave Vista enters the battlefield tapped unless seven or more cards are in your graveyard.

card.name: Blood APS
card.text: {1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Change in the House of Flies
Fragment
card.text: This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a permanent with mana value 3 or less. Destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Congregation of Flesh
card.text: You may have Congregation of Flesh enter the battlefield as a copy of any creature or enchantment on the battlefield, except if it entered from a graveyard it's an enchantment and not a creature. Communion {4}{U}{B} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Treasure APS
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Loathsome Shagohod
card.text: Whenever one or more Beasts you control attack, up to one target creature you control fights up to one target creature you don't control. Communion {1}{G}{G} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Patchwork Mandragora
card.text: Whenever one or more Homunculi you control attack, create a token that's a copy of target creature with the least power among creatures you control. Communion {1}{W} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Diviner of Holy Blood
card.text: Whenever one or more Ogres you control attack, exile the top two cards of your library. Until end of turn, you may play those cards. Communion {3}{R} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Optos Masterwork
card.text: Whenever one or more Eyes you control attack, target creature you control gains flying until end of turn. Communion {U} (You may cast this from your graveyard for its communion cost. If you do, it enters with a finality counter on it and isn't a creature.)

card.name: Desolate Godgrave
card.text: When Desolate Godgrave enters the battlefield, you draw two cards and you lose 2 life. {1}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice Desolate Godgrave or discard a creature card: You draw two cards and you lose 2 life.

card.name: Verdant Godgrave
card.text: When Verdant Godgrave enters the battlefield, search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {3}{G}, {T}, Sacrifice Verdant Godgrave or discard a land card: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Occluded Godgrave
card.text: When Occluded Godgrave enters the battlefield, create a token that's a copy of target permanent you control not named Occluded Godgrave. {2}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice Occluded Godgrave or discard an instant card: Create a token that's a copy of target permanent you control not named Occluded Godgrave.

card.name: Glistening Godgrave
card.text: When Glistening Godgrave enters the battlefield, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. {1}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice Glistening Godgrave or discard an enchantment card: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Dragon APS
card.text: Flying

card.name: Everywhere APS
card.text: This land is a Plains, Island, Swamp, Mountain, and Forest. ({T}: Add {W}, {U}, {B}, {R}, or {G}.)

card.name: Bitter Schism
card.text: Exile target nonland permanent. Its controller creates a token that's a copy of it, except it's a Saga enchantment with "r{4}—You lose the game" in addition to its other types and abilities.

card.name: Colossal Emergence
card.text: Creatures you control have base power and toughness 20/20.

card.name: Effigy APS
card.text: This token can be used to represent a token that's a copy of a permanent.
